name: Origami Robotics
description: Robotics automation company building technical systems for industrial teams.
fit: Manufacturing background plus AI pipeline expertise makes you credible with technical buyers.
approach: Lead with industrial GTM credibility, outreach discipline, and technical commercialization.
resumeAngle: Frame yourself as an AI-enabled operator for industrial automation growth.

name: Carrot Labs
description: AI product lab with startup-style execution and GTM ambiguity.
fit: You can connect product positioning, outbound systems, and practical demand generation.
approach: Pitch yourself as an operator who can connect product insight to pipeline growth.
resumeAngle: Highlight startup execution, AI workflow building, and demand generation systems.

name: Arga Labs
description: Deep tech AI research company with commercialization upside.
fit: You bring outreach, commercialization, and early-market messaging where research teams often need help.
approach: Focus on translating technical value into pipeline and partner conversations.
resumeAngle: Show AI commercialization, partnerships, and technical market development.

name: Unifold
description: AI developer tooling startup with product adoption and ecosystem motion.
fit: You can support product adoption, positioning, and workflow-driven GTM for technical users.
approach: Speak to user adoption, technical audiences, and demand capture.
resumeAngle: Emphasize developer-tool adoption strategy and AI go-to-market execution.

name: Rubric AI
description: AI model evaluation platform with clear sales and partnership potential.
fit: You can sell measurement, evaluation, and operational clarity to technical buyers.
approach: Position yourself around trust, evaluation workflows, and commercialization.
resumeAngle: Lean on AI sales, partnerships, and category education.
notes: Applied. Need a sharper follow-up around model governance value.

name: GrazeMate
description: AgTech AI startup focused on automation and field operations.
fit: Your industrial and operations experience can map to practical automation narratives.
approach: Lead with operational outcomes, not AI buzzwords.
resumeAngle: Show process improvement, automation, and real-world adoption.

name: Aurorin CAD
description: AI-powered CAD design software with engineering workflow relevance.
fit: You can speak workflow adoption and commercialization for technical software teams.
approach: Frame value around engineering workflow adoption and commercial clarity.
resumeAngle: Position yourself as a GTM builder for technical design software.
notes: Reached out on LinkedIn. Waiting on response.

name: Librar Labs
description: AI knowledge infrastructure company with systems and information workflow themes.
fit: You can translate systems strategy and adoption into a commercial narrative.
approach: Speak to structured knowledge workflows, systems thinking, and buyer enablement.
resumeAngle: Emphasize AI systems strategy, adoption, and narrative clarity.
notes: Need stronger examples around AI workflow implementation.
